Received: from rogue-relay.unknownhost.net (198.51.100.220)
From: "Microsoft Office 365 Security Team" <no-reply@security-office365-updates.com>
To: <cfo@enterprise.com>
Subject: ACTION REQUIRED: Unusual Sign-in Detected for Security Alert
Date: Tue, 19 May 2026 16:27:34 +0000
Message-ID: <532718.alert-pds@enterprise.com>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

Microsoft Office 365

Your account has experienced an unusual sign-in attempt from a new location.

Location: Moscow, Russia
IP Address: 82.102.23.109

To prevent permanent deletion of your account and suspension of your corporate email services, you must verify your identity immediately. Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in complete lockout of your workspace.

Verify your identity here: http://microsoft.com-update.security-checkpoint.xyz/login.php

Thank you,
Microsoft Security Team

Body semantics contain credential harvesting request indicators
